testcase.name: test_unknown_stock_symbol_resolves

skipped.message: 3DVELO did not resolve to a price (Yahoo Search may be blocked or symbol changed). asset={'wallet_id': 'd979d02c-1547-4751-a607-f46bb47ab4ac', 'asset_type': 'stock', 'symbol': '3DVELO', 'coingecko_id': None, 'name': '3DVELO Test', 'quantity': 1.0, 'total_cost_usd': 1.0, 'avg_cost_usd': 1.0, 'realized_pnl_usd': 0.0, 'tx_count': 1, 'avg_price': 1.0, 'price_usd': 0.0, 'price_eur': 0.0, 'price_chf': 0.0, 'value_usd': 0.0, 'value_eur': 0.0, 'value_chf': 0.0, 'cost_usd': 1.0, 'pnl_usd': -1.0, 'pnl_pct': -100.0, 'change_24h': 0.0, 'daily_change_usd': 0}
